canonical_definition: An analytical method that examines the attention scores within a transformer model to understand how different segments of the input prompt, such as in-context demonstrations, influence the model's processing.
papers: PANDAS: Improving Many-shot Jailbreaking via Positive Affirmation, Negative Demonstration, and Adaptive Sampling
Position: We Need An Algorithmic Understanding of Generative AI
